text: ňĻAt leastňļ for ňĻthe favour ofňļ making Quraysh habitually secure‚ÄĒ
secure in their trading caravan ňĻto Yemenňļ in the winter and ňĻSyriaňļ in the summer‚ÄĒ
let them worship the Lord of this ňĻSacredňļ House,
Who has fed them against hunger and made them secure against fear. <sup foot_note=1330>1330</sup>

foot_notes.1330: Blessing the people of Quraysh with provision and security is probably the answer to Abraham‚Äôs prayer in 14:35-37.
